hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); LABEL=$([ -n "$FILE" ] && basename "$FILE" || echo "files"); cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "chore: auto-save $LABEL ($(date +%H:%M:%S))"'
